media.title: The Black Eyed Peas once asked, âWhere is the love?â Well now you can tell Will.I.Am, Fergie and co that itâs right here at The Oak every Tuesday.â¨â¨$95 will get you 2 courses and a glass of wine each, with the kitchen whipping up some absolute beauties like this âsay whenâ white lasagna.â¨â¨We also promise not to play the Black Eyed Peas if that helpsâ¦â¨â¨Call (02) 4961 1977 to book a table!

HOW DO WE RATE JOSHâS FORM?? 

Are you gym-curious? Wanting to start a bit of a health kick in a comfortable space, while also incorporating beer? Gym Stuff for Non-Gym People might be the event youâve been looking forâ¦

On Saturday, Feb 28th from 11am - 1pm, the team from Valkyrie Gym will turn the Oak into a place of exercise, teaching basic and practical gym techniques to the soundtrack of music by DJ Bonnie Ann.

Youâll get a free Young Henrys or Heaps Normal on arrival, and youâll leave with a four-week exercise plan.

Perfect excuse to skip work for the day!

Tickets are $30 (or a small donation) with proceeds going to ACON Hunter. Hit the link in bio to grab a ticket!
